channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: FDA Revises Cyclospora Test Results for Taylor Farms Lettuce
item.description: The U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) has clarified that a previous positive cyclospora test result from Taylor Farms' shredded iceberg lettuce was a false positive. Initial findings suggested t...

item.title: Senegal President Bassirou Faye Takes Over as New ECOWAS Chairman
item.description: President Bassirou Faye of Senegal has emerged as the new Chairman of the Economic Community of West African States (ECOWAS), marking a fresh leadership phase for the regional bloc. According to a sta...

item.title: Protest against Ken-Betwa river linking project intensifies over land disputes
item.description: The Ken-Betwa Link Project, India's first major river interlinking initiative, has sparked widespread protests in Madhya Pradesh due to alleged irregularities in land acquisition and compensation for ...

item.title: Health Impacts of Night Shifts and Biphasic Sleep Solutions
item.description: The article explores the health risks associated with night shifts, including increased risks of dementia, heart disease, and cancer, linked to disrupted sleep patterns and the body's circadian rhythm...

item.title: Spain clinches World Cup victory amid Madrid celebrations
item.description: In Madrid, fans braved sweltering temperatures and the sluggish pace of a World Cup final to celebrate Spain's 1-0 win over Argentina. With temperatures nearing 32°C at 9pm, supporters filled bars, pa...

item.title: Councillor criticises City of Cape Town's lack of progress on informal settlements
item.description: Councillor Bongani Ngcombolo has expressed deep concern over the City of Cape Town's failure to address the dire conditions in informal settlements, particularly after a fatal shack fire in Kanana. Th...

item.title: Vice Ganda's Hilarious Moments as Memerimar on 'It’s Showtime'
item.description: The article highlights Vice Ganda's comedic performance as the character Memerimar during a segment on the popular Philippine television show 'It’s Showtime.' Known for his versatile acting skills, Vi...

item.title: CJP Protest in Delhi Demands Education Reforms as Sonam Wangchuk Ends Fasting Strike
item.description: The Cockroach Janta Party (CJP) is organizing a significant protest in Delhi on July 20, 2026, demanding urgent education reforms and government accountability. Led by climate and education activist S...

item.title: Fire near Pemberton, B.C. is under control, but smoke remains a concern
item.description: A wildfire near Pemberton, British Columbia, has been contained by the British Columbia Wildfire Service (BCWS), though smoke from the blaze is still affecting the area. The incident, reported by The ...

item.title: Fazlur Rehman says his criticism was directed at policymakers, not security institutions
item.description: JUI-F chief Maulana Fazlur Rehman has refused to apologise for his recent remarks regarding security personnel, maintaining that his comments were aimed at those responsible for policymaking rather th...

item.title: Brunswick East property sells for $1.69m after auction discount
item.description: A freestanding house in Brunswick East sold for $1.69 million after passing in at auction without a genuine bid, with the vendor lowering their reserve price. The three-bedroom weatherboard home at 17...

item.title: Arsenal claim Premier League title after 22-year wait, celebrating with a citywide parade in North London
item.description: Arsenal Football Club has ended a 22-year drought by securing their first Premier League title since 1998, sparking jubilant celebrations across north London. The Gunners' triumph came after a thrilli...

item.title: Canada’s first World Cup ends with Spain’s victory over Argentina
item.description: FIFA’s largest-ever World Cup concluded on Sunday with Spain defeating Argentina 1-0 in a final held in East Rutherford, New Jersey. The tournament, featuring 48 teams, marked Canada’s first hosting o...

item.title: Political Rivalry Intensifies as PML-N and PPP Vie for Control in AJK Elections
item.description: The Azad Jammu and Kashmir (AJK) elections are witnessing a fierce political battle between the Pakistan Muslim League-Nawaz (PML-N) and the Pakistan People's Party (PPP), with both parties' top leade...

item.title: ABC compliance bot and antisemitism at royal commission
item.description: The article discusses concerns surrounding the Australian Broadcasting Corporation's (ABC) compliance processes and their handling of antisemitism allegations within the context of the Royal Commissio...

item.title: Floods and Landslides Disrupt Kashmir, Impacting River Flows
item.description: The article details severe flooding and landslides in Indian-administered Kashmir, causing significant casualties and infrastructure damage. Heavy rains triggered flash floods and landslides, burying ...

item.title: Jurgen Klopp Confirms Germany Coaching Role in Next Few Days
item.description: Former Liverpool manager Jurgen Klopp has confirmed he will take charge of Germany's national team in the next few days, according to a report by Naija News. The 59-year-old, currently Red Bull's Spor...

item.title: ABS-CBN's Word of the Day: Trionda - July 20, 2026
item.description: The article announces the 'Word of the Day' feature by ABS-CBN Lifestyle for July 20, 2026, highlighting the word 'trionda'. This daily initiative aims to educate audiences about lesser-known terms th...

item.title: Spain clinch second World Cup title with extra-time victory over Argentina
item.description: Spain secured their second World Cup triumph with a 1-0 extra-time victory over Argentina in a final marred by post-match chaos. Ferran Torres' decisive goal in the 106th minute ended Argentina's camp...

item.title: WSJ Criticizes Trump Over Efforts to Discredit Report on Air Force One Switch
item.description: The Wall Street Journal's conservative editorial board sharply criticized President Donald Trump for attempting to discredit a New York Times report detailing his switch from the Qatari-gifted Air For...
